title: Run-local idea ledger
premise: A flat CSV can track ideas without a database or UI.
next_test: Create idea_ledger_v2.csv with explicit update_policy and repeat provider handoff.
main_risk: Schema may duplicate 07_ideas.md or permit unsupported status upgrades.

title: Manual provider debate before debate_ideas.py
premise: Automating debate is justified only after manual provider_router debate repeats.
next_test: Run one more manual provider_router debate after update-policy test.

title: Score fields inside idea ledger
premise: Scorecard dimensions may belong in ledger columns before a separate scorecard artifact exists.
next_test: Test score columns only after update_policy prevents status inflation.

title: Pipeline report markdown table
premise: A report may help only after multiple idea runs exist.
next_test: Wait until at least three idea runs exist.
main_risk: Report can duplicate validate_run and run artifacts.

title: Change brief generator from snapshot diffs
premise: Snapshot diffs can seed future idea or research runs, but need a second snapshot first.
next_test: Take a second snapshot and manually create one change brief before scripting.

title: Discussion import from Markdown transcript
premise: Parsing transcripts into ledger rows risks brittle parsing and weak evidence discipline.
next_test: Do not implement; manually distill discussion into evidence rows first.
